steps.title: Add the side lengths
steps.content:
Sides $LM$ and $MN$ each have length $x$, and side $NL$ has length $y$. The sum of the three side lengths is
$$
x+x+y=2x+y
$$

steps.title: Interpret the equation
steps.content:
The equation
$$
2x+y=49
$$
shows that $49$ is the total of the three side lengths, which is the triangle's perimeter.

steps.title: Match the statement
steps.content: The choice that describes the sum of the lengths of the three sides matches this interpretation. The answer is C.
